description: First labeled core evaluation set for email_answer_context, derived from synthetic fixtures in synthetic-eval-corpus.olm.

cases.question: Who sent the HARICA certificate mail?
cases.expected_answer: cert-admin@example.org sent the HARICA certificate reply.
cases.notes: Synthetic reply in _wichtig: subject AW: Zertifikat Harica.

cases.question: Which folder contains the Apple Support notes import message?
cases.expected_answer: The Apple Support notes import message is in the memo folder.
cases.notes: Synthetic original in memo: Notizen und Dateien in die Notizen-App importieren - Apple Support (DE).

cases.question: Which message mentioned the Windows 11 TPM constraint?
cases.expected_answer: The Windows 11 TPM constraint message is Microsoft: So schalten wir den TPM-Zwang in Windows 11 ab - Golem.de.

cases.question: Who announced that the ticket system test version was created?
cases.expected_answer: service-owner@example.org announced the ticket system test version.
cases.notes: Synthetic original in _wichtig: ticket system Testversion.

cases.question: When did the ticket system Reboot 2026 thread begin?
cases.expected_answer: The earliest labeled message in the ticket system Reboot 2026 thread is from 2025-11-26T06:19:41.
cases.notes: Core thread anchor from Sent Items.

cases.question: Which messages belong to the ticket system Reboot 2026 conversation?
cases.expected_answer: The core labeled ticket system Reboot 2026 conversation contains the sampled Sent Items replies and follow-ups from 2025-11-26 through 2025-12-04.
cases.notes: Thread-membership core set from the sampled conversation.

cases.question: Which email had attachments and discussed Configurator 2 Blueprints?
cases.expected_answer: The MDM email from 2025-05-27 discussed Configurator 2 Blueprints and had attachments.

cases.question: Which email had the manual attachment for ticket system agent manual?
cases.expected_answer: The Sent Items original ticket system agent manual email had the manual attachment.
cases.notes: Attachment-bearing original in Sent Items with body Md im Anhang.

cases.question: What did the HP scan attachment say?
cases.expected_answer: The system can identify the scan email but not recover readable body text from it.
cases.notes: Real scan mail with attachment and empty/weak recoverable body.

cases.question: Which source-shell message discussed ticket system DNS and certificate?
cases.expected_answer: The source-shell message AW: ticket system DNS und Zertifikat matches, but the visible body remains weak.
